chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.3025 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application. 29.12.2025 Mr. Makhdoom Syed Tahir Abbas, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, APG Sindh. ----------------------------- Counsel for the applicant states that due to family altercations, the incident occurred, however, the main case registered under Sections 324 / 34 PPC has been patched up between the parties and the applicant was acquitted vide order dated 08.12.2025. Though this is an offshoot case but as per the contents of the FIR, the complainant has brought the weapon to the police station stating that that has been snatched from the applicant who attempted to fire upon him. Be that as it may, this is a fit case for further inquiry besides the proviso under Section 23(i) of the Sindh Arms Act, 2013, therefore, falls within the prohibitory clause. Therefore, the applicant is released on bail against a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of the trial Court Court. This bail application is disposed of accordingly. The applicant is directed to attend the trial Court regularly on every date. J U D G E Asif
